description: This file defines the RcaService class, which provides business logic related to Root Cause Analysis (Rca) entities, including retrieval, upsert, and deletion based on defect IDs.

classes.name: RcaService
classes.description: Service class managing Rca entities associated with defects, providing methods to retrieve, update, and delete Rca records.

methods.name: RcaService
methods.description: Constructor initializing RcaRepository and DefectService dependencies.

methods.name: getByDefectIdOrNull
methods.description: Retrieves an Rca entity by defect ID, returning null if not found.

methods.name: upsert
methods.description: Creates or updates an Rca record associated with a defect ID using provided patch data.

methods.name: deleteByDefectId
methods.description: Deletes an Rca record associated with the specified defect ID if it exists.
